name: What if my work injury claim gets denied in West Valley City?
description: Appeal to state labor commission with evidence; act fast on deadlines.[2][3]

mainEntity.name: What if my work injury claim gets denied in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to state labor commission with evidence; act fast on deadlines.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Request a hearing with the Utah Labor Commission or Idaho Industrial Commission if denied; they mediate disputes.[2][3] Insurers must decide within 21 days (Utah) or face penalties.[2] Key factors: Common denial reasons include late reporting, non-work related, or pre-existing conditions; you can appeal with evidence.[1] Practical guidance: Gather medical records, witness statements; file formal dispute quickly—deadlines are strict. Get legal help as claims staff assist but don't represent you.[2] Appeal strengthens many cases.
